evals.prompt: 我是一个保险经纪人，我要给客户销售报销组合，我手里有一堆公司给的保险产品资料，如何快速给客户定制化方案？请用 spec-intake 引导我。我是业务人员，不懂技术，只知道客户经常问怎么组合最划算。
evals.expected_output: The assistant should not immediately dump a final JSON. It should classify the request, ask one high-leverage question at a time, surface compliance and boundary risks, and eventually produce a JSON spec that passes scripts/validate_spec.py.
assertions: Asks one question at a time before final JSON.
Final JSON includes business_objects, capability_boundaries, evidence_requirements, data_governance, review_gates, missing_fields, and readiness_label.
Final JSON distinguishes durable product library from generated proposal draft.
Final JSON includes Memory, Agent/Recipe, product UI, external business systems, and human/compliance boundaries.

evals.prompt: 客户想让 Friday 接入他们的保险产品资料库，然后自动帮销售生成方案。你要看 /Users/derek/Projects/memory-connector 的代码背景来判断 Memory 能做什么、Agent/Recipe/产品层该做什么，再引导我补 spec。
evals.expected_output: The assistant should inspect local code/docs, distinguish Memory evidence recall from Agent/Recipe execution and product UI/workflow, ask business questions before finalizing technical boundaries, and produce a JSON spec that passes scripts/validate_spec.py.
assertions: Reads local memory-connector docs or code before declaring technical boundaries.
Does not claim Memory generates final insurance recommendations or formal quotes.
Marks pricing, compliance, customer-facing delivery, and CRM writeback as external/human/product-layer concerns unless explicitly scoped.
